description:
Create an 'Artwork' reference in the Jurism library for Norman Rockwell's painting 'The Problem We All Live With' using the following metadata:
- Title: The Problem We All Live With
- Artist: Norman Rockwell
- Date: 1964
- Medium: Oil on canvas
- Archive: Norman Rockwell Museum
- Abstract: Iconic painting depicting Ruby Bridges being escorted by U.S. Marshals during the desegregation of New Orleans schools.

metadata.target_title: The Problem We All Live With
